title: nz_topo50_map_sheet
description: Represents the LINZ Topographic 1:50,000 map sheets.

topo_id.description: The unique identifier for the topographic feature.

feature_type.description: The specific type of feature being represented (e.g., 'bridge_line', 'building').

t50_fid.description: The unique identifier for the feature in the source database.

capture_method.description: The method used to capture the data (e.g., 'manual','automated').

change_type.description: The type of change that occurred to the feature (e.g., 'new', 'updated').

update_date.description: The date when the feature was last updated in the database.

create_date.description: The date when the feature was created in the database.
